author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Root cause: Unicode em-dashes (U+2014) in PTX comments — PTX is ASCII-only. Secondary: nested {} blocks with scoped .reg declarations. Fix: hoisted all regs to top level, replaced em-dashes with --. 8/8 FlashAttention GPU tests passing. Shared memory kernel with tiled K/V, online softmax, causal masking running on RTX 3090.
